sentences.arabic: يَشْعُرُ الإِنْسَانُ بِالرَّاحَةِ حِينَ يُرَتِّبُ غُرْفَتَهُ.
sentences.translation: Čovjek se osjeća ugodno kada sredi svoju sobu.
sentences.translationEn: A person feels at ease when they tidy their room.

sentences.translation: Ranim je pažljivo sredila knjige i odjeću.
sentences.translationEn: Ranim tidied her books and clothes carefully.

sentences.arabic: نَظَرَتْ إِلَى الْغُرْفَةِ الْمُرَتَّبَةِ وَشَعَرَتْ بِالسُّرُورِ.
sentences.translation: Pogledala je uređenu sobu i osjetila radost.
sentences.translationEn: She looked at the tidy room and felt pleased.
Order in a place rests the mind.
